nodes.name: Golden-crowned tanager
nodes.summary: The golden-crowned tanager (Iridosornis rufivertex) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
